title: MonitoredVehicleJourney
description: A real-time representation of a vehicle journey being actively tracked, including position and schedule adherence data.

lineRef.description: Reference to the line being monitored

vehicleLocation.description: Current geographic position of the vehicle

bearing.description: Compass bearing of travel in degrees

delay.description: Delay in seconds relative to schedule (negative = early)

occupancy.description: Current passenger occupancy of the vehicle

vehicleJourneyCode.description: Unique code for this vehicle journey

routeRef.description: Reference to the route being served

serviceCalendarRef.description: Calendar defining when this journey operates

stopTimes.description: Scheduled stop times for each stop on this journey
